arts.ttl: Gordon sends 'humble' message after Newcastle Carabao Cup win vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon has urged his teammates to remain 'humble' following Newcastle United's win over Arsenal in the second leg of the Carabao Cup semi-final. Following the Gunners' 2-2 draw with City at the start of the season, Erling Haaland told Mikel Arteta to'stay humble' – and the exchange quickly went viral on social media .

arts.ttl: INSIDE THE EFL: Meet the Wigan wonderkid that Premier League clubs are raving about as Man United and Arsenal circle, how Frank Lampard silenced his critics and a magic man charging up League Two
arts.sum: WILL PICKWORTH: When Sam Tickle reported for England Under 21s duty for the first time in September 2023, it capped a remarkable five years for the goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Arsenal icon locks horns with Gary Neville over 'disrespectful' comments
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE - Gary Neville called out Arsenal's players for their treatment of Erling Haaland during last week's Premier League clash, which a Gunners legend has taken issue with

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe reveals Newcastle only had TWO DAYS to work on the new system that downed Arsenal and sealed Carabao Cup final spot
arts.sum: Howe's side - who are in the Carabao Cup final for the second time in three years - will now play either Tottenham or Liverpool in the showpiece event on Sunday, March 16.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta admits Arsenal players must 'recharge' during Dubai warm-weather training - after 'painful' Carabao Cup defeat to Newcastle
arts.sum: Just days after their thrashing of Manchester City 5-1, Arteta's players will be forced to take stock after losing 4-0 on aggregate, their wait for a domestic trophy rolling on.

Raya attempted to find Declan Rice on the edge of the box but Fabian Schar pressed high and forced a turnover which fell into the path of Gordon, and the winger had the simple task of netting to make it 4-0 on aggregate and end our hopes of reaching Wembley. Our first good sight of goal arrived when a neat flick from Leandro Trossard found Gabriel Martinelli on the edge of the box and he nudged the ball into Odegaard’s path who seemed set to score, but his effort clipped the post and spun wide.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta shares injury update on Gabriel Martinelli with Arsenal left sweating on star
arts.sum: Arsenal forward Gabriel Martinelli was forced off in the first half of their Carabao Cup semi final loss against Newcastle through injury and will now undergo an MRI scan

arts.ttl: Newcastle's path to silverware is clear, Arsenal's is not
arts.sum: Newcastle United will have a chance to end their trophy drought that has lasted nearly six decades, whereas Arsenal are still on the quest to win any silverware.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe determined to end Newcastle’s trophy drought in Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: A dominant 2-0 win secured the Magpies a 4-0 aggregate victory over the Gunners.

arts.ttl: Newcastle legend Alan Shearer calls out Ian Wright after Alexander Isak display against Arsenal in Carabao Cup semi-final triumph
arts.sum: Isak, who has repeatedly been linked with the Gunners in recent months, impressed against the visitor's defence duo of Gabriel Magalhaes and William Saliba during the semi-final.
